GeoMx - weekly plan

2025
Monday - Baking overnight 37℃
Tuesday – Check ROIs together for this week + Prep 4h: 8 samples, 4 slides
Wednesday - Prep + staining 3h (8 samples), scanning and ROI selection - 4 samples, 2 slides
Thursday - Scanning and ROI selection - 4 samples, 2 slides
Friday - Library preparation together

2024
Monday - Prep 3-4h - 2 samples 1 slide
Tuesday - Staining and ROI selection
Wednesday - Prep 3-4h - 4 samples 2 slides
Thursday - Staining and ROI selection
Friday - Library preparation together

GeoMx - daily plan

DAY 1 / Monday
16:00-12:00 baking overnight 37℃

Day 2 / Tuesday
12:30-13:30 baking 60℃
13:30-14:20 deparaffinization
14:20-14:50 target retrieval/ steamer
14:50-15:10 Expose RNA targets/ Proteinase K digestion
15:10-15:30 Postfix
15:30-16:00 In situ hybridization

DAY 3 / Wednesday
09:00 - 09:30 Warm to 37℃
09:45 - 10:45 Stringent Wash
10:45 - 11:15 Blocking with Buffer W
11:15 - 12:15 Staining - all 4 slides
12:45 - 13:30 Scanning - first half, 2 slides
13:30 - 16:00 ROI selection + Segmentation
16:00 - 18:00 Sample collection, stored at -20℃

DAY 4 / Thursday
08:45 - 09:30 Scanning - second half, 2 slides
09:30 - 14:00 ROI selection + Segmentation
14:00 - 17:00 Sample collection, stored at 4℃

DAY 5 / Friday
09:00-10:30 Dry down and rehydrate the samples
10:30-11:30 Load PCR plates (primer, collection, master mix)
11:30-13:00 PCR running
13:00-13:30 Pooling
13:30-16:00 AMPure beads cleanup

DAY 6 / Next Monday
Library quality control (Tapestation) in FuGu

GeoMx - ROIs and mini batches

GeoMx
